title: CAM, Latham, Trilegal, Khaitan act on Manipal Hospitals ₹8,000 crore proposed IPO
description: Manipal Health Enterprises Limited has proposed an initial public offering of equity shares, consisting of a fresh issue of ₹8,000 crore and an offer for sale by certain existing shareholders of up to 43.23 million shares.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas is advising Manipal Hospitals on this IPO.The core transaction team was led by Yash J Ashar (Senior Partner) and Janhavi Manohar (Partner), with support from Anjali Menon (Principal Associate), Associates Bhaskar Kumar, Tejaswi Sade, Parameswaran Chida
